goal: Ship a provider-backed controlled execution candidate without production execution authorization.
risk: AOF may overclaim provider execution readiness or make operators assemble scattered evidence manually.
loss_boundary: Do not call v9.4 release-ready unless candidate audit, capability delta, product value evidence, and release-state audit are green, and production execution remains false.
acceptance_gates: release-state-audit includes the v9.4 candidate gate
evidence_plan: schemas, commands, candidate artifact, capability delta, product value evidence, focused tests, release-state audit
stop_conditions: Stop if upstream provider evidence refs are missing
